prompt: Create a phoenix rising from flames like those in image 1, shaped like the bird in image 2, with digital circuits from image 3 forming its wings and core.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of a phoenix rising centrally from a fiery burst of glowing orange and golden particles, similar to the dynamic explosion in image 1. The phoenix should adopt the majestic, wide-winged, downward-swooping pose of the bird in image 2. Its entire form, including its head, body, and outstretched wings, must be intricately composed of the glowing orange and blue digital circuit patterns and traces depicted in image 3.
objects: Phoenix composed of glowing orange digital circuit patterns
Phoenix composed of glowing blue digital circuit patterns
Phoenix composed of digital circuit traces
